title: IntercontinentalExchange (ICE) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates
text: IntercontinentalExchange (ICE) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.46 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.40 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.31 per share a year ago.
